subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The application of Section 2 is subject to the following:

ol.li: The Governing Requirements of NCC Volume Two.
The State and Territory variations, additions and deletions contained in the Schedules to the ABCB Housing Provisions and NCC Volume Two.

callout.p: In NCC 2019, the content of Section 2 of the ABCB Housing Provisions (other than content added in NCC 2022 or later) was contained in Part 3.0 of NCC Volume Two.
